sections.label: Verse 1
lines: Vangngaih anglai ka pomta,
Sanmun muang nunnuam sawlbang ka hei ta
Vangngaih bel ka To Zeisu ka neih khit teh
Gual in nuihciam hong lel zong
Naubang kah, heh nong nem Pa
Hong lamsak ka To Zeisu ken nei hi veng

sections.label: Chorus
lines: Zaila in ka awih cimlo, va bang in ka laam cimlo
Vangngaih bel ka To Zeisu ka neih khit teh
Ziin in gi-bang hong khen zong, anglai naubang ka pom sa
Vangngaih Jesu tawh sambang khen nawnlo ding

sections.label: Verse 2
lines: Simlei ah mi zatam ten na pallai
Zubang in hong nial zong leh
Sanggah ken, anglai naubang ka pom cimlo
Kua tawh tanbang kong teh diam, nong itna thukin sang ee
Sanggah ken, na pal ningtui ka dawn cimlo

sections.label: Verse 3
lines: Mubang kong ngaih luat man maw
Ka pallai nang ading hong pia ing ee
Lungmawl kei, anglai naubang hong pom in la
Hong sang aw ka duang nemno
Ka luankhi tui bek mah hi
Nang ading kum sawt tangbang hong damsak aw
